title: ResolutionStatistic
description: A monthly aggregate count of matters resolved short of formal litigation by the Commission. One canonical schema reconciling CCHR's two parallel resolution datasets: 'Office of Mediation and Conflict Resolution Cases' (tmha-56pf — settlements negotiated to completion each month) and 'Pre-Complaint Resolutions' (6ayi-8khd — pre-complaint resolutions by calendar month). AGGREGATE ONLY — no individual case is published.

resolutionType.description: Which resolution dataset this row comes from — settlements closed by the Office of Mediation and Conflict Resolution, or pre-complaint resolutions.

count.description: The monthly count — 'MONTHLY MEDIATIONS CLOSED' (mediation) or 'Pre-Complaint Resolution Totals' (pre-complaint).
